action.reasoning: Observation: short training succeeded and produced a baseline checkpoint with val balanced accuracy 0.7462, but the iteration failed only because the local smoke test pointed predict.py at /data where no test.txt exists in this training container. Analysis: the core pipeline is now working; we should avoid wasting time on a nonexistent local test split and instead make predict.py more robust by accepting either test.txt or val.txt for smoke tests, then immediately submit eval to get the first real leaderboard signal and runtime measurement. Decision: patch predict.py for flexible split detection, keep the trained checkpoint, run a quick local smoke test on val.txt, and submit the existing checkpoint for evaluation.
